## Test Summary

| Sprint item | Type | Gate | Required evidence | Current evidence / action |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TBM-006 Speed-up mode | Logic + UI | BLOCKING + ADVISORY | Unit tests for 1x/2x/3x, battle HUD state visible | `tests/unit/turn/speed_up_mode_test.gd`; `tests/integration/ui/battle_hud_test.gd`; visual sign-off remains human queue |
| TBM-007 Turn save/load integration | Integration | BLOCKING | Round-trip active turn/combat state | `tests/integration/turn/save_load_integration_test.gd`; `tests/integration/save/battle_save_manager_integration_test.gd` |
| BS-001 Settlement trigger flow | Logic | BLOCKING | Victory/defeat/retreat trigger tests | `tests/unit/settlement/settlement_trigger_test.gd` |
| BS-002 Experience distribution | Logic | BLOCKING | Formula and boundary tests | `tests/unit/settlement/experience_distribution_test.gd` |
| BS-003 Battle evaluation | Logic | BLOCKING | Rating/bonus tests | `tests/unit/settlement/battle_evaluation_test.gd` |
| BS-004 Material/equipment drops | Logic + Config/Data | BLOCKING + ADVISORY | Deterministic drop tests and smoke | `tests/unit/settlement/drop_calculator_test.gd`; packaged playthrough smoke |
| BS-005 Settlement save/load | Integration | BLOCKING | Battle history, rewards, and settlement outcome round-trip | `tests/integration/settlement/save_load_integration_test.gd` |
| CM-001 Camera baseline | Integration + Visual/Feel | BLOCKING + ADVISORY | Camera/map state tests and visual evidence | `tests/integration/camera/battle_camera_map_test.gd`; caveat: delivered as 2D top-down fallback, not original isometric target |
| CM-002 Grid map rendering | Integration + Visual/Feel | BLOCKING + ADVISORY | Grid toggle, map size, height map tests plus screenshot evidence | `tests/integration/camera/battle_camera_map_test.gd`; `production/qa/evidence/grid-map-rendering-evidence.md` |
| CM-003 Camera/map persistence | Integration | BLOCKING | Camera preference save/load | `tests/integration/camera/save_load_integration_test.gd` |
| UI-001 Battle HUD | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Interaction tests and HUD screenshot evidence | `tests/integration/ui/battle_hud_test.gd`; `production/qa/evidence/battle-hud-evidence.md` |
| UI-002 Resource HUD/menu | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Resource update and menu tab tests | `tests/integration/ui/battle_hud_test.gd`; `production/qa/evidence/resource-menu-evidence.md` |
| UI-003 UI save/load integration | Integration | BLOCKING | UI state persists through save/load | `tests/integration/ui/save_load_integration_test.gd`; `tests/integration/save/battle_save_manager_integration_test.gd` |
| Vertical slice end-to-end | Integration | BLOCKING | Main menu -> battle -> settlement -> rewards packaged smoke | `builds/windows/SRPG.exe --headless --srpg-playthrough-smoke` |

## Blocking Automated Plan

- Run Godot parse: `GodotExe --headless --check-only project.godot`
- Run GUT scene runner: `GodotExe --headless res://tests/test_runner.tscn`
- Run packaged smoke: `builds/windows/SRPG.exe --headless --srpg-playthrough-smoke`

## Manual / Advisory Plan

- Visual walkthrough for the final vertical slice remains centralized as `MAN-003` in `production/sprints/sprint-人工.md`.
- Camera acceptance must preserve the product-scope note: Sprint-001 shipped a top-down fallback grid; do not silently relabel it as completed isometric camera work.
- Packaged smoke exit resource warnings are non-blocking for this sprint only if the scripted smoke still reports `PACKAGED_PLAYTHROUGH_SMOKE PASS`.

## Definition of Done Evidence

- Functional automation: `godot --check-only` PASS, GUT runner PASS, packaged smoke PASS.
- Documentation: sprint revalidation table remains present in `production/sprints/sprint-001.md`.
- External gates: human visual/fun validation can remain open in `sprint-人工.md` without reopening Sprint-001 automation scope.

## Next Steps

- Keep Sprint-001 QA closed unless a regression touches turn flow, settlement, camera/map, UI, save/load, or packaged playthrough.
- If CM-001 is reopened, split the deferred isometric camera into a new sprint story rather than changing this QA plan retroactively.
